description_long: This radiator features a striking geometric design with a series of red, rectangular metal tubes arranged in a stepped, concentric pattern, all mounted on a flat, light gray rectangular back panel. The tubes are evenly spaced and connected at the bottom, where two metallic pipe fittings are visible, suggesting water or steam flow. The red tubing stands out sharply against the neutral background, giving the radiator a modern, architectural appearance. The overall structure is slim and flat, with the heating elements projecting slightly from the wall-mounted panel. The visible pipe connections at the bottom indicate standard plumbing integration, while the absence of visible controls suggests a minimalist aesthetic. The radiator's design is both functional and decorative, suitable for contemporary urban interiors or public spaces.
description: A modern, wall-mounted radiator with red, stepped rectangular tubing on a flat gray panel and visible bottom pipe fittings. Its geometric design is both functional and decorative.
description_view_0: Front view shows the full stepped red tubing pattern and both bottom pipe fittings clearly.
description_view_1: Side view reveals the slim profile and the protrusion of the red tubing from the flat gray panel.
description_view_2: Rear view displays only the plain gray back panel, with no visible tubing or fittings.
description_view_3: Opposite side view again highlights the slimness and the red tubing's projection from the panel.
attribute_pipe_connections: two pipe connections at the bottom, horizontally oriented
attribute_grille_pattern: open geometric tubing, no grille or cover
